title: 5/18〜5/22 Weekly Market Report
summary: 51/67 themes (76%) advanced (+3.14% avg). Nvidia earnings drove massive positive spillover. Semiconductor Equipment +11.2%.
report:
## Market Overview (Week of May 19–23)

Strong broad advance. 51 of 67 themes (76%) rose, average return +3.14%. Nvidia earnings drove massive positive spillover to Japanese AI supply chain stocks.

---

## Rising Themes

### 🥇 #1: Semiconductor Equipment (+11.2%)
Nvidia massively beat earnings. Tokyo Electron (8035), Advantest (6857), Lasertec (6920) surged 8–15%.

### 🥈 #2: AI Datacenter (+9.8%)
Nvidia guidance validates datacenter infrastructure investment acceleration globally.

### 🥉 #3: Optical Communication (+8.4%)
Fujikura (5803) and Furukawa Electric (5801) hit 52-week highs on datacenter bandwidth demand validation.

### Additional: Power Semiconductor (+7.1%), Physical AI (+6.9%), Edge AI (+6.3%)

---

## Falling Themes

Defensive themes (Food & Beverage, Healthcare, Telecom) lagged in risk-on environment.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

Nvidia's earnings = quarterly catalyst for Japan's entire semiconductor ecosystem. Semiconductor Equipment, Optical Communication, AI Datacenter now in 'Accelerating' momentum — highest priority tracking category.
